scripts.start:local: npm run prepare:sam-env && AWS_PROFILE=uprevit-amit sam local start-api -t ../template.yaml --env-vars ../.sam-local-env.json
scripts.start:local:build: npm run prepare:sam-env && sam build -t ../template.yaml --cached --parallel --build-in-source && AWS_PROFILE=uprevit-amit sam local start-api -t ../.aws-sam/build/template.yaml --env-vars ../.sam-local-env.json
scripts.lint: eslint controllers/**/*.ts utils/**/*.ts models/*.ts types/**/*.ts db/*.ts app.ts --no-ignore
scripts.lint:fix: eslint controllers/**/*.ts utils/**/*.ts models/*.ts types/**/*.ts db/*.ts app.ts --no-ignore --fix
